summary: Added restoreFromBackup() that clears all localStorage and IDB state, then rehydrates from a BackupPayload. 15 new tests cover clearing, rehydration of every data type including scoreSyncSeq=0, MLS state base64 decode, nostrBackedUp flag, and a full collect-restore round-trip.
verification_notes: Fixed chat clearing order (loadAllGroups before clearAllGroupData) and scoreSyncSeq guard (changed from falsy check to !== undefined). All verification questions passed.
